name: Operation Ironwood
brief: Volt Typhoon-class PRC state-sponsored actor has pre-positioned inside the OT network of a US Western Interconnection substation using living-off-the-land techniques. Actor accessed environment via compromised VPN credentials of a field maintenance contractor and has been dormant for an estimated 14 days. No active disruption yet — intelligence indicates pre-staging for potential activation during geopolitical crisis. Blue Team must identify and evict actor while preserving substation uptime.
blue_objectives: Detect and remove actor without disrupting substation operations
Identify all compromised credentials and rotate
Establish behavioral baselines for anomaly detection
Coordinate with E-ISAC for threat intelligence sharing
red_posture: Actor uses LOTL techniques (built-in Windows tools, legitimate VPN sessions). Persistence via valid contractor account. Has mapped OT network topology. No active destructive action — in pre-positioning phase. Detection confidence: very low. Escalation authority: hold and maintain access.
